name: ZQ02360 / UKing 120W ring spot (15 CH — verify against your manual)
_notes: Assumption: 15CH = 13CH table with TWO channels inserted at relative 5–6 (e.g. pan/tilt speed), shifting old CH5–13 to CH7–15. Then: CH7=speed, CH8=dimmer, CH9=strobe, CH10–13=RGBW, CH14–15=show/reset or ring (not driven here). If your manual instead keeps CH1–13 identical and only adds CH14–15, use config/fixture_zq02360_13ch.json with the fixture in 15CH only if the manual confirms no shift — otherwise edit pan/tilt/dimmer indices to match your table. If beam is dark, extend main.py set_defaults for RGBW per manual.
